name: novel_text_optimizer
description: Optimizes web novel text for readability, pacing, excitement, and reader engagement. Rewrites sentences, enhances descriptions, improves dialogue, and adjusts pacing. Invoke when user needs text refinement, style improvement, or content polishing.
instructions: Analyze the provided text for areas needing optimization
Improve sentence flow and readability while maintaining original meaning
Enhance descriptions and action sequences for better reader engagement
Optimize dialogue to sound more natural and character-specific
Adjust pacing to improve reader engagement and excitement distribution

chapters.description: Array of chapter numbers to optimize

audit_report.description: Audit report file path for targeted optimization
